segment: Higher Education (UC, CSU, CA Community Colleges)
overview: Comprehensive, whole-facility energy efficiency support for higher education; no cost to participate; includes assessments, engineering, paperwork support, incentives processing.
key_benefits: Free energy assessments; engineering support; assistance with paperwork/data; incentives and processing
eligibility: Existing higher education facilities in SCE/PG&E/SDG&E/SCG territory that pay the Public Purpose Program surcharge; UC/CSU/CCC owned/operated/occupied.
incentive_structure: Participating campuses receive technical assistance and incentives; project-specific values not published on public page.
measurement_approach: Strategic Energy Management (SEM) available via SEM Offering; whole-facility approach
evidence_sources: HEEP page; SEM offering page; CLEAResult program overview

overview: Whole-facility SEM program for commercial businesses; no cost to participate; rebate incentives plus operational improvements; up to six years of technical support.
key_benefits: Rebates and incentives; operational improvements; whole-facility approach; long-term coaching (up to six years)
eligibility: SCE commercial customers (details not fully enumerated on page)
incentive_structure: Rebates and incentives for energy-saving projects under SEM framework; specific amounts not listed on public page.
program_dates: Program cohorts active since 2024 per SCE EE Annual Report
measurement_approach: SEM with NMEC baseline (per SCE portfolio documentation); whole-facility metered savings
evidence_sources: Local Commercial SEM page; SCE 2024 EE Annual Report (program SCE_3P_SEM_002)

overview: SEM program for industrial & agricultural facilities; no-cost participation; incentives/rebates plus customized services and operational improvements; supports decarbonization goals.
key_benefits: Incentives and rebates; project planning; engineer access; time and cost savings; best practices; decarbonization
eligibility: SCE industrial/ag customers; multi-year cohort participation typical (per SCE 2024 EE Annual Report)
incentive_structure: Incentives available; amounts not listed publicly; metered savings approach under SEM with NMEC per SCE reports.
program_dates: Program launched H2 2024; recruiting ongoing per SCE Annual Report
measurement_approach: NMEC (dynamic baseline) to determine facility-level savings, includes capital and O&M actions
evidence_sources: Industrial & Ag SEM page; SCE 2024 EE Annual Report
